name: repo-memory
description: Maintain lightweight per-repo memory without making memory always active. Use when updating a runbook, theory, learnings, durable project facts, or when the user asks what should be remembered for future sessions. Distinct from seance or qmd search: this curates memory artifacts; search tools retrieve history.
